task_description: Implement 4 major features: PDF invoices for orders, product changelog/versions system, custom pages redesign with HTML support and templates, and promotional popup system with multiple modes and auto-close.

verification.summary: All PHP files pass php -l syntax validation. All Blade views have balanced directives. No functional tests available in sandbox (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, no vendor/ installed). Code review v2 approved with no blocking issues.
